# llms.txt — The soft War

## Fichiers critiques
- CLAUDE.md — règles et structure du projet
- MEMORY.md — mémoire vivante (index, décisions, gotchas, sessions). À LIRE EN PREMIER.
- AGENTS.md — instructions cross-IDE (renvoie au CLAUDE.md)
- README.md — pitch + setup local
- .env.example — variables d'env requises

## Stack
- Next.js 16 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind 4
- Drizzle ORM + Postgres
- Lucia + magic link (Resend)
- BullMQ + Redis + worker Node.js
- Mastra (orchestration LLM TypeScript-first)
- Anthropic SDK (avec prompt caching)
- mammoth + pdf-parse + fountain-js (extraction texte)
- MDX + SSR Next.js (dashboard render)

## Dossiers
- src/app/ — routes Next.js (admin, public /p/[slug], api)
- src/lib/{db,auth,queue,mastra,utils}/ — clients infra
- src/modules/ — 10 modules pipeline indépendants
- worker/ — worker BullMQ standalone
- drizzle/ — migrations DB

## Services Railway
- the-soft-war-web (Next.js)
- the-soft-war-worker (Node worker)
- the-soft-war-redis (Redis)
- the-soft-war-db (Postgres)

## Sources d'inspiration (manuel)
- C:/dev/claude/oscardcstudio/Nothing_But_Blue_Sky/notes/research/script_to_dev_app.md — deepsearch archi
- C:/dev/claude/oscardcstudio/Nothing_But_Blue_Sky/notes/{worldbuilding,teaser_pool,entities,fragments,endings,refs}.md — pipeline manuel à automatiser
